ie.updateNote: Following a shooting in Brussels city centre on 16 October 2023, the threat level for Belgium has been set at Level 3, meaning authorities view the threat level as “serious”. Irish citizens in Belgium are advised to exercise a high degree of caution and follow the advice of local authorities.
